data.title: Update sprint SKILL.md Phase 5 to reference per-worktree-review-commit.md
data.description:
## Description

Modify sprint SKILL.md Phase 5 to replace batch review with per-worktree serial processing:

1. After sub-agents return, iterate worktrees in completion order
2. Read and execute per-worktree-review-commit.md for each worktree
3. Update Phase 5 Step 7 (review) to dispatch in worktree cwd
4. Update Phase 5 Step 10 (commit) to commit in worktree branch
5. Add merge step: merge worktree branch into session branch after commit
6. Ensure merge-to-main.sh runs once at session end (Phase 8), not per worktree

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (EDIT — safeguard file, authorized by story scope)

### TDD Requirement
RED eval from task T5 must turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sprint eval passes
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references per-worktree-review-commit.md
  Verify: grep -q 'per-worktree-review-commit' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Phase 5 contains worktree serial loop
  Verify: grep -qi 'for each worktree\|per.worktree\|serial.*review' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
